name: Tomato Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the core, seeds, and ribs from the chilies.
2. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and mix well.
3. Makes about 1 cup.
4. Will last 2 or 3 days if refrigerated.
5. Serve with hamburgers, French fries, tortillas, Oriental beef, and chips.
6. A few drops of hot-pepper sauce will substitute well if chilies are not available.
